entry.title: New: CR 24-124 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending the following: 1. FIRST READING of Bill 21, CD1 (2023), to: 1) allow after-hours emergency airstrip operations at Kapalua Airport by amending the Conditions of Zoning under Section 19.510.050, Maui County Code; and 2) correct the tax map keys, property description, and acreage for Kapalua Airport; and 2. RECORDATION of the Unilateral Agreement.

Disaster, Resilience, International Affairs, and Planning Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
